02/Sep/25 6:56 AM   Done Provider Offboarding Duplicate   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-2218, PR1050558-2223, PR1050558-2426, PR1050558-1580, PR1050558-1708, PR1050558-2450 Unassigned Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2436
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi single place for IT to adjust time from 12 months (ex. to 6 months)

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

{color:#403294}*ITEMS ABOVE ARE BUILT IN* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1580|smart-link]{color:#403294} {color}

*for this user story:*

*And all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed* 		02/Sep/25 6:56 AM   4 image-20250821-105158.png 29/Aug/25 10:22 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 29/Aug/25 10:22 AM 1|i0dy23: 02/Sep/25 6:56 AM As a Data Quality team member, I need clinicians to be inactivated if they haven’t worked in 12 months, so that our clinician data is clean 21/Aug/25

Enhanced Clinician Inactivation: Case and Task Closure

None

1|i0dvyr: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Data Quality Team Member
# Open a HPF record in ‘Active’ status and ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months and having open cases & tasks
# HPF of sister site accounts with clinician same as initial HPF record should also have ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months



*Expected Result:*

# HPF record should be updated as below
#* Status = Inactive
#* Credentialling Status = Inactive
#* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away
# And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank
And all open cases and tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed

*Actual Result:*

# Facility onboarding case are not closed
# Child cases of SCP and Facility onboarding case are not closed
# Tasks associated with the Child cases are not closed

Not all cases and tasks on the clinician account are closed when the HPF is made inactive

1|i0dpir: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Data Quality Team Member
# Open a HPF record in ‘Active’ status and ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months
# HPF of sister site accounts with clinician same as initial HPF record should also have ‘Last Date Worked’ older than 12 months



*Expected Result:*

# HPF record should be updated as below
#* Status = Inactive
#* Credentialling Status = Inactive
#* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away
# And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank
And all open cases and tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed

*Actual Result:*

# HPF record and related items are also not updated when there is no sister site
# HPF record and related items are also not updated when there is a siter site with HPFs having Last Date Worked is more than 12 months old

HPF status is not updated to Inactive status when LWD is more than 12 months for all sister sites

1|i0dp2r: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM User : sys admin/MSL -CPA

Scenario :

User (*Jennie A Becerra*) with PT as MD has 5 facilities with one of the HPF as Manipal Hospital > Now there is a Contract created for Manipal Hospital as one of the HPF in *00003421* which was executed. Now there was person account (*Jennifer Lindzi Aaberg*) with PT as NP with a contract created for Manipal Hospital which created a CPA for NP and MD(CPA-088). After which there were other Contracts created for different HPF for *Jennie A Becerra* so the above contract got cancelled.

Now another Nurse (*Gillian A Abang*) executed a Contract for Manipal Hospital As the *Jennie A Becerra* did not have a executed Contract for Manipal Hospital no new CPA got created.

*Question 1*: I believe this is expected.

Now for *Jennie A Becerra (MD)* create a contract with Manipal Hospital > execute the Contract

*Question 2*: I believe a new CPA should be created with Nurse *Gillian A Abang* who has contract executed for Manipal HPF (which currently is not happening)



!Screenshot 2025-08-26 at 6.15.25 PM.png|width=941,height=361,alt="Screenshot 2025-08-26 at 6.15.25 PM.png"!

Observation Bug: CPA not created for one of the scenario

1|i0doyz: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as System Admin and navigate to Account object.
2-Create a Service Account record.
3-Now navigate to related tab and create a Client Contract record.
4-Now login as SFO and navigate on same Client contract record.
5-Navigate to the Shift list and create a shift record.

Issue - While creating a Shift record, getting insufficient access error.

Expected Result - User should not get the insufficient access error.
Actual Result - While creating a Shift record user is getting insufficient access error.

Observation Bug:While creating a Shift record as an SFO, getting insufficient access error as the Contract and its associated account was created by System Admin.

1|i0dnkr: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as MSL User and navigate to Clinician Account record.
2-Navigate to Existing HPF Record.
3-Ensure status on HPF is Prospect.
4-Now without updating contracting status field update the Hospital Privileged Date and save it.


Issue - If on HPF record status is Prospect and without updating the Contracting Status, user update the Hospital Privileged Date then upon saving the record - Status is going from Prospect to Waiting to be Scheduled, it is skipping the Candidate status.

Expected Result - Ideally, it should not skip the Candidate status.
Actual Result - As of now it is skipping the Candidate Status and navigating to Waiting to be Scheduled.

If on HPF record status is Prospect and without updating the Contracting Status, user update the Hospital Privileged Date then upon saving the record - Status is going from Prospect to Waiting to be Scheduled, it is skipping the Candidate status.

None

1|i0dlr7: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM Steps to Reproduce:-

1-Login as MSL in the Corp HC Org and navigate to the Corporate Support Apps.
2-Navigate to the Clinician Account record and open the Account record.
3-Navigate to cases tab in order to navigate to the Facility Onboarding Cases.
4-Ensure below Child Cases are created for the Parent Facility Onboarding Case as:-

MSS Onboarding Child Case
Hospital Application Preparation Child Case
Hospital Privileging Child Case
Payer Enrollment Child Case
Hospital Orientation Child Case

5-Now from app launcher navigate to Task object and verify that User is able to see the following tasks are created for Child Cases of the Facility Onboarding.

Issue 1 - The MSL persona cannot view the Payer Enrollment child case of Parent Facility Onboarding Case or the associated tasks linked to it.

Expected Result - The MSL persona should be able to view the Payer Enrollment child cases or the associated tasks linked to it.

Actual Result - The MSL persona cannot view the Payer Enrollment child cases or the associated tasks linked to it.

The MSL persona cannot view the Payer Enrollment child case of Parent Facility Onboarding Case or the associated tasks linked to it.

None

1|i0dkxf: 08/Feb/26 4:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a Clinician contract record with start date (17 Aug 2025) greater than Client contract’s CPA Start Date (16 Aug 2025 11:45 pm)
# On the clinician contract, try to configure rates for the CPA mentioned in previous step

*Expected Result:*

User should be able to see the rate from the Client Contract CPA in clinician contract

*Actual Result:*

User sees message ‘No available rates’ even though CPA Client date is less than clinician start date. If the CPA Start Date is made 16 Aug 2025 7 pm, user is able to configure the rate

Regression Bug - Unable to configure rate on clinician record even though CPA Client date is less than clinician start date

1|i0dj7z: 08/Feb/26 4:06 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login to Core HC org as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a client contract record with values configured for different Type of Rate
# Navigate to Summary tab and click Delete icon near the Type of Rate header
# Click Delete icon near the individual rates

*Expected Result:*

# All rates should be deleted when user clicks the Delete icon near the Type of Rate header and corresponding CPA records should be deleted
# Respective rate should be deleted when user clicks the Delete icon near the individual rates and CPA record should also be deleted if there are no other rate under the Type of Rate

*Actual Result:*

# Rates are not deleted when user clicks the Delete icon near the Type of Rate header
# Rates are deleted when user clicks the Delete icon near the individual rates but CPA records remain even though there is no rate associated with the Type of Rate. No PCA record is available under the CPA record

Regression bug - Issues on 'Summary' tab of client contract

1|i0dgm7: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM
*Steps to Reproduce:*
1. Login to Core HC org as Recruiter.
2. Navigates to the Accounts tab > Click on Create Clinician record
3. Click on Create HPF button on top right corner.
4. Fill the madatory field and click on Next button on the Update NPI page.
5. Click on Finish button on Update NPI page
6. Fill the Primary Specialty, Practicing Specialty, Taxonomiey fields on the Clinician Information page > and click on Next button.
7. Search for Service account able to add the service account.
8. Fill the mandatory fields Facility Association page > Click on Save and Refresh After Save button.
9. Click on Next button on the Facility Association page.
10. Try to add more Primary Specialty, Practicing Specialty, Taxonomiey fields on HPF record.
10. Click on Qualifications tab.
11. Verify that Taxonomy & Speciality records.

*Expected Result:* If record exists, it should be marked as primary. If record not exist, it should create a new record.

*Actual Result:* Showing 2 duplicate records among one record marked as primary.

PFB Screenshot:
!image-2025-08-19-18-32-14-355.png|thumbnail!

Duplicate records being created for Taxonomy & Speciality

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1869, PR1050558-1925 Remove required from Type field on the omniscript/screen
Use messaging (formula validation) to check if more than one “Additional Bonus” is added and Display Validation message , and prevent the user from adding more than one additional bonus.
0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project _Story focus on systematically enforcing that the user can only add the additional bonus (types) to one facility/HPF. Split from story_ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And completed the *Contract Request* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link]
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab*
Then the system shall only allow Additional Bonuses (types) to be added to *One* Facility/HPF.

* The “Type” field that holds the Additional Bonuses values should be optional
** ONCE a Type (Additional Bonuses) is selected, then Rate and Unit of Measure are Required.
* Once the user has added Additional Bonuses to one Facility, then they are NOT allowed to add to another facility.
* If the user deletes all the Additional Bonuses from a Facility, then they can add Additional Bonuses to a new facility.
* Help Text: Enter the bonus to the facility at which they are primarily working.
* -Error message if the user tries to add additional bonuses to more than one HPF/Facility: Additional bonuses can only be added to one facility.- NOT NEEDED, solution will be to hide Help Text, Type, Rate, Unit of Measure. 		26/Aug/25 12:38 PM   3 14/Aug/25 8:24 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 14/Aug/25 8:34 PM 1|i0dc6f: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 18/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Bonus - Enforce additional bonus on 1 Facility/HPF

1|i0dbpr: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a Clinician account having 2 HPF records linked to it and both should have rates configured on the client contracts (Bonus)
# Create a clinician contract record for both HPFs
# From Summary tab of the clinician contract, configure the rates(Bonus) for 1st HPF by adding Additional Bonus(Night Shift)
# Rates should be created along with respective CPA record
# Now go to Configure rate of the 2nd HPF > select Bonus > Click on Next

*Expected Result:*

Additional rates should not be shown to the second HPF as Addtional rates should be visible to one Facility

*Actual Result:*

Addtional rates are shown to second Facility

Note: Right now we are only Showing help text and user has option available to create additonal bonus to second HPF Facility.

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1873, PR1050558-1929, PR1050558-2047 Create/reuse record trigger flow on HPP. Look for the Case using the Case.HpfhealthcarePractitionerId and then look for the task using CaseId and subject.
Update Task status to Completed according to the field updates provided.

* Testing: ok to update information manually for testing purposes 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When specified fields are updated in a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then the specified task record is updated so that Status = Completed

* Facility Onboarding parent case
** MSS Onboarding child case
*** Defect Analysis - Start Date: close when *Defect Analysis Start Date* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Defect Analysis - Complete Date: close when *Defect Analysis Completed Date* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Send Request & Release form: close when *Request and Release Returned* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Perform PSL2 - Start Date: close when *Prescreen Level 2 Requested* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Reference Verification Review: close when *Received Current Completed References* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Perform PSL2 - Complete Date: close when *Prescreen Level 2 Completed* is populated on the related HPF record
** Hospital Application Preparation child case
*** Send Hospital Application to Clinician: close when *Hospital Application Sent On* is populated on the related HPF record
*** COI (Certificates of Insurance) Completion: _manual close - no automation_
*** Determine First Scheduled Date: close when *First Scheduled Date* is populated on the related HPF record
*** Submit Hospital Application: close when *Hospital Application Sent Date* is populated on the related HPF record
** Hospital Privileging child case
*** Hospital Privileging: close when *Hospital Privileged Date* is populated on the related HPF record
** Payer Enrollment child case
*** Review Facility Requirements & Create PEP: close when *PEP Sent Date* is populated on the related HPF record
*** PEP Returned: close when *PEP Returned Date* is populated on the related HPF record
** Hospital Orientation child case
*** Schedule Hospital Orientation: close when *First Scheduled Date* is populated on the related HPF record

_criteria for closing tasks are also captured in the clinician onboarding sheet_ 		26/Aug/25 6:41 PM   5 Screenshot 2025-08-22 at 12.03.42 PM.png 13/Aug/25 11:55 AM SCP Sprint 7 14/Aug/25 3:02 PM 1|i099yr:zzwzzzzi 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, I need task records to be closed automatically, so that I do not have to do duplicate work in multiple systems 21/Aug/25

Automated Onboarding Task Record Closure: Facility Onboarding

Requirements: Incomplete Requirements
1|i0d7jb: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM *Issue 1* : Other Reasion field is missing on the ATS Applicatant record.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

1. Log in to the Prospect Portal with valid credentials.
2. Click on My Applications tab.
3. Click on Withdrawal Application button and check the checkbox and select any option and click on Next button.
4. Verify ATS Applicant record

*Issue 2* : Status of the HPF record not getting updated.

# Log in to the Prospect Portal with valid credentials.
# Click on My Applications tab.
# Click on Withdrawal Application button and check the checkbox and select any option and click on Next button.
# Verify Status of the HPF record.

*Issue 3*: Verify Navigation Options

# Log in to the Prospect Portal with valid credentials.
# Click on My Applications tab.
# Click on Withdrawal Application button and check the checkbox.
# Verify Next without checking the checkbox - close out the window, no updates made

*Pre-requisite:*
1. HPF record should be created.
2. ATS Applicants should be created.

*Expected Result:*
1. Other Reasion field is missing on the ATS Applicatant record.
2. Status of the HPF record not getting updated.

3.Next button should be available on the screen.

*Actual Result:*
1. Should be Other Reasion field on the ATS Applicatant record.
2. Should be change the status of HPF record to be Inactive.

3.Next button not be available on the screen.

Please find the evidence.

!image-2025-08-13-16-39-09-709.png|width=83.33333333333333%!

!image-2025-08-13-16-40-09-126.png|width=100%!

!image-20250813-113002.png|width=75%,alt="image-20250813-113002.png"!



CC: [~accountid:712020:4ca4d021-66b2-4c63-a1d0-34ed1fb3aede] [~accountid:63781e13a593cb822e93558c]

Failed to update Clinician Application Withdrawal - HC Portal

None

1|i0d4lz: 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM Account : [https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/001gP000004BxIbQAK/view|https://corehc--qa.sandbox.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Account/001gP000004BxIbQAK/view|smart-link] (Sample)

User : Myrtle Will

Pre-requisite : Clinician Contract is in Executed Status with CPA and PCA records Populated

*Steps to reproduce:*

Login to the Org with above user > Open the Account (with pre-requisite)> Click on Start From Previous Active Contract > Complete the flow

A new Contract with status draft gets Created > Open the Contract > Navaigate to Related Tab .

*Expected Result:*

The CPA start date from the existing Contract should be populated on the new cloned contract

*Actual Result:*

The CPA start date from the existing Contract is not populated on the new cloned contract

26/Aug/25 12:42 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Portal Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-5653, PR1050558-4907, PR1050558-811, PR1050558-3546 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1789
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1829, PR1050558-1885, PR1050558-2066 Use a Record Triggered Flow for Update on Object *ATS Applicant*

Flow need to run with the User Permission not System Permission

* First Search for User Record exist if it exist EXIT the Flow
** bpats__ATS_Applicant__c.bpats__ATS_Applicant__c
* If No User Record exist if it then
** restrict access to Enable Customer User ability
*** *Clinician Experience Team Member* (CET) - will be a new persona [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-840|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-840|smart-link]
**** CET - supports Clinician once contract is complete.
** {{FirstName}}= Contact.FirstName
** {{LastName}}=Contact.LastName
** {{Email = Contact.Email}}
** Username = FirstName.LastName(if dups then append # 1,2,3, etc. )@scp.com
*** First concatenate username string as per specified format
*** Make query that no user execute with [firstName.lastname@scp.co|mailto:firstName.lastname@scp.co]m
*** If exists - increase number and append integer in user name.
** {{ContactId}}= bpats__ATS_Applicant__c.bpats__ATS_Applicant__c
** {{TimeZoneSidKey}}= {{'America/New_York'}}
** {{Alias = first letter of Contact.FirstName+}}Contact.LastName (trim at 8 characters)
** {{EmailEncodingKey = 'ISO-8859-1'}}
** {{LanguageLocaleKey = 'en_US'}}
** For provisioning portal users: (previous stories: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-144|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-144|smart-link] [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-332|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-332|smart-link]
** Role = Automatically Created
** Profile = Core HC Customer Community Plus Login User
** User License = Customer Community Plus Login
** Permission Set = Portal User
* Assumption in the ATS Applicant Account field will be populated with a Person Account (Clinician) record. - Kristin to confirm Assumption with Asymbl. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I update the *ATS Stage* field on an *ATS Applicant* record to *Awaiting Intake Form*
And the clinician has not yet been provisioned HC Portal access
Then the clinician is *automatically provisioned HC Portal access*

* If the Email field is not populated, the portal access is not provisioned

26/Aug/25 6:29 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider 360 Accepted 01/Apr/26 2:52 PM Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-5627, PR1050558-2202 Khushboo Ahuja Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1719

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1836, PR1050558-1892, PR1050558-2062 Record triggered flow on HPF, with the following conditional updates

IF HPF.Contract_Status = “Executed”    THEN  HPF.Status = Candidate
IF HPF.Hospital_Application_Sent_Date__c is populated (blank to value) THEN HPF.Credentialling_Status__c = Pending
IF HPF.Hospital_Privileged_Date__c    is populated (blank to value), HPF.Status = Waiting to be Scheduled

IF HPF.First_Clinical_Shift__c is populated, HPF.Status__c = Active 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When the following updates occur
Then the same Healthcare Practitioner Facility is updated as specified below:

* Status: Prospect to Candidate
** When the Contracting Status field on an HPF is updated to Executed, update the Status to Candidate
* {color:#97a0af}-Credentialing Status: null to Pending-{color}
** {color:#97a0af}-When the Hospital Application Sent is populated (via integration from QGenda), update Credentialling Status to Pending-{color}
* Status: Candidate to Waiting to be Scheduled
** When the Hospital Privileged Date is populated (via integration from QGenda), update the Status to Waiting to be Scheduled
** _If First Clinical Shift is also populated at time of Hospital Privileged Date populated, go straight to Active status (see rows below)_
* {color:#97a0af}-Credentialing Status: Pending to Active-{color}
** {color:#97a0af}-When Location and Appointments Edit Detail in QGenda is updated (SF team to update with SF field), update Credentialing Status to Active-{color}
** {color:#97a0af}-Temp Inactive reason in QGenda is updated, update Temp Inactive reason to match-{color}
* Status: Candidate OR Waiting to be Scheduled to Active
** When the First Clinical Shift field on an HPF is populated (via integration from QGenda), update the Status to Active
** _Note this is built in_ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1716|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1716|smart-link] _and is only included in this story for complete view of status updates_
* _Credentialling Status and Temporary Inactive Reason are populated in Salesforce from QGenda data via integrations_ 		26/Aug/25 6:29 PM   4 image-20250822-141155.png 07/Aug/25 9:12 AM SCP Sprint 7 19/Aug/25 4:39 AM 1|i0cyff: 18/Feb/26 3:21 PM As an MSL, I need Healthcare Practitioner Facility records to have accurate status values, so that downstream systems flow correctly and SCP corporate support users are viewing accurate information 18/Aug/25

Healthcare Practitioner Facility Status Automation

None

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1837, PR1050558-1893, PR1050558-2061 *Duplicate Executed Contract with Same Employment Type*
Record triggered flow on Contract, when Contract is -created- updated, query for other contracts (of record type = Contract) with the same employee Type, for the Clinician and check the status.
If Contract.Status is execute, update Contract.Status = Canceled and Contract.Cancel_Reason__c = Terminated

*Drafts Expire After 30 Days*
Use existing flow that is used to create contract (if available). Set the Draft Expiry Date to Today + 30
Need to check if Draft Expiry Date exists, if not create the field.
Create a schedule trigger flow , that runs daily and checks/filters for Contracts where Draft expiry date is TODAY.
For those contracts, update the Contract.Status = Canceled and Contract.Cancel_Reason__c = Expired 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I attempt the following scenarios while creating or updating Clinician Contract records
Then the following happens:

* Duplicate Executed Contract with Same Employment Type
** Update original Contract record where Status = Executed to Status = Canceled and Cancel Reason = Terminated
* Drafts Expire After 30 Days
** When a contract record is created, set the Draft Expiry Date to 30 days from creation date
** When the Draft Expiry Date is today, update the Contract Status to Status = Canceled and Cancel Reason = Expired

_Note: multiple Canceled contracts can exist with the same Employment Type_ 		26/Aug/25 12:23 PM   5 07/Aug/25 8:36 AM SCP Sprint 7 19/Aug/25 10:42 AM 1|i0cyeb: 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Clinician Contracting Specialist, I need Salesforce to enforce validations around updating clinician contracts, so that duplicate record creation and mismatches are prevented 20/Aug/25

When I navigate to a clinician person account record
Then I am able to select “Initiate Clinical Match” in the header
And I can see the following:

* Clinical Match Request
** Display clinician name (read only)
** Quality Reason (multi-select picklist)
*** values: Clinical Care, Provider Skillset, Patient Volume, Provider's Efficiencies, Patient Acuity
** Service Reason (multi-select picklist)
*** values: Interpersonal Skills, Anger Management, Shift Attendance, Organizational Skills, Patient Complaints, Provider Behavior
** Business Issues Reason (multi-select picklist)
*** values: Mission Compliance, Malpractice History, Documentation, Litigation History, Contractual Dispute, Hospital Request, Contractual Issue, Scheduling Concerns
** Professionalism Reason (multi-select picklist)
*** values: Personal Hygiene, Recurrent Tardiness, Personal Integrity, Inappropriateness
** Qualifications Reason (multi-select picklist)
*** values: Application Issue, Criminal Background, Health Concern, Impairment, License Revocation, References
** Description (free text, required)
* Then when I select Save, a {color:#bf2600}case {color}record is created with the attributes above 		26/Aug/25 12:12 PM   5 05/Aug/25 1:49 PM SCP Sprint 7 13/Aug/25 7:45 AM 1|i099yr:zzwwz9 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a MSL, I need to initiate the clinical match process, so that SCP teams have visibility into accurate statuses 19/Aug/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1657, PR1050558-1658, PR1050558-1848, PR1050558-1904, PR1050558-1656 *Validation Rule:*

Create a validation rule in CPA to check if Physician Healthcare Facility.AccountID = NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility.AccountID other wise throw error that “CPA Account Association mismatch. Make sure the MD/DO and NP/PA association is make with the Clinician(s) working for the Facility (Service Account)”

*Contract was for a Physician (Clinician’s Professional Titles = MD or DO) AccountId.*

*Queueable Apex:*

Write an asynchronous Apex code (we need MAP to do this logic with less effort so Apex is the way to GO)

When the Contract of Type = Clinician is Executed

Get the Professional Title from Contract.AccountId.Professional_Title__pc

h2. *Scenario 1: If Professional_Title__pc = MD or DO*

Then

*Step 1 (CPA Update): First check for CPA records and repoint new HPF ID update the records to the new HPF*

# Query HPF(s) in the Contract via Contract > PNC > HPF with the ContractId that started the Process and create a map like below 
## Map<AccountId, HPFId > ContractingAccountIdHPFId (Account Id is unique within all the Healthcare Practitioner Facility in a Contract)
## Set<AccountId> ContractingAccountId
# Query the Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c records with Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId = ContractingAccountId
# Loop through the Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c records
## if Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c <> ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId)
### Prepare Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c sObject list for update update with
#### Id = Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.ID
#### Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c = ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId)
#### Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”
### add to List for UpdateCPA
### Remove the Account ID from ContractingAccountIdHPFId and ContractingAccountId as they are already processed

*Step 2 (New CPA): Then look at the HPF where HPF Client ID is not in CPA and if there is any delta then use them to create a new CPA (When looking in HPF for record with Client ID not in CPA and If there are multiple HPF records for a same facility and clinician then pick the HPF based on latest Contract Executed Date)*

# Query all HPF in Contract > PNC > HPF where and create a map like below 
## Select Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c, Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.PractitionerId.Professional_Title__c in (*NP, PA*) AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId IN ContractingAccountId in SORT BY Contract.StartDate ASEC (old to Latest so that we get only Latest HPF)
### Map<AccountId, HPFId > NPPAAccountIdHPFId (Since we are using ASEC sort you will get only latest HPF !! *Sort is IMPORTANT*)
### Set<AccountId> NPPAAccountId
## Loop through Map NPPAAccountIdHPFId
### Create Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c sObject for each record in the SOQL result from Step 2 -> 1.a
#### NP_PA_Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c = NPPAAccountIdHPFId.get(AccountId)
#### Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c = ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(AccountId)
#### Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”
### add to List for InsertCPA



*Step 3* Upsert UpdateCPA and InsertCPA in one DML and ContractId.PersonContactId

----

*Call a Chained Queued JOB and Send the Input of Upsert List<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c> and ContractId.PersonContactId from Step 3*

Create Map<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c, Set<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Id>> MapCPACase

(you can pick any DMDO or NPPA Account ID as they will be the same)

Create List<Case> ListCPACase

(you can pick any DMDO or NPPA Account ID as they will be the same)

*Step 1: Loop through the Update List*

# if MapCPACase contains Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c then
## Get AccountCAPSet = MapCPACase.Get(Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c)
## AccountCAPSet.add(*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c*.Id)
## Put MapCPACase <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*, *AccountCAPSet*>
# else
## new Case
### Record Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
### Subject = Collaborative Practice Agreement - <Healthcare Practitioner Facility>
### Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
### Status = Not Started
### Case Owner = <Account Team “Medical Staff Liaison - CPA> (fetch from AccountTeamMember where TeamMemberRole = Medical Staff Liaison - CPA”
### Priority = Medium
### Contact Name = <Clinician (Person Account)> *ContractId.PersonContactId* from Input
### Account Name = <Service Account from HPF> *Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*
## Add Case to ListCPACase
## Create new Set <Id> <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Id*>
## AccountCAPSet.add(*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c*.Id)
## Put MapCPACase <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*, *AccountCAPSet*>



*Step 2: Create Case from List* ListCPACase

*Step 3: Loop* ListCPACase

# Set CAPId = MapCPACase.Get(Case.AccountId)
# Loop Set CAPId
## *CPA Review* = new *CPA Review*
### Collaborative Practice Agreement = [CAPId.Id|http://CAPId.Id] (CPA Id is storied in the Set)
### Case = [ListCPACase.Id|http://ListCPACase.Id] (Case Id)
## Add to a List of *CPA Review*
# Insert *CPA Review* 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison - CPA in the Corporate Support apps
When the following criteria are met on a contract record:

* Contract Record Type = Clinician
* *Professional Title*
** *Contract > Clinician Person Account*
*** *Professional Title = MD, DO*-, NP, PA-
* *Status = Executed*

Then, if the executed Contract was for a *Physician* (Clinician’s Professional Titles = MD or DO) a Collaborative Practice Agreement record is created:

* For each Healthcare Practitioner Facility associated with the executed contract, *associate the Physician to each HPF at that facility* where
** *Professional Titles = NP or PA*
** Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site
** If an existing CPA record exists between the MD/DO and NP/PA, update the CPA record with new HPF with Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending” and enable history tracking on original NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility and Physician Healthcare Facility using Field History Tracking
* Each Collaborative Practice Agreement record created shall populated with:
** NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility = <create one record for each Professional Titles = NP, PA at every HPF within the Clinician Contract>
** Physician Healthcare Facility = <Healthcare Practitioner Facility associated with executed contract>
** Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”

_Note: If there are NO clinicians with Professional Title NP/PA or MD/DO, then no relationship records are needed_



And, Collaborative Practice Agreement case is auto generated for *each* Service Account with the following information populated:

* Record Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
* Subject = Collaborative Practice Agreement - <Healthcare Practitioner Facility>
* Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
* Status = Not Started
* Case Owner = <Account Team “Medical Staff Liaison - CPA>
* Priority = Medium
* Contact Name = <Clinician (Person Account)>
* Account Name = <Service Account from HPF>

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1822, PR1050558-1974 Create a Platform Even Name = HPFUpdates

Fields

# HPFId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Id
# GlobalProviderId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId.Global_Provider_ID__pc
# GlobalFacilityId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId.Global_Facility_ID__c
# FirstScheduledDate = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.First_Scheduled_Date__c

10/Sep/25 4:52 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-5863, PR1050558-2218, PR1050558-2223, PR1050558-2426, PR1050558-3992, PR1050558-1708, PR1050558-2436, PR1050558-5641, PR1050558-6314 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1580
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1854, PR1050558-1910, PR1050558-2049 single place for IT to adjust time from 12 months (ex. to 6 months)

Create an apex batch job that runs daily. It will query all related sites for the clinician and then look for the HPF’s belonging to that sites. If the Last Worked Date is more tahn a year and newer that the other ones we proceed to inactivate.

Batch job on HPF
Query for HPF where Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive. Get related Clinician records as well
Filter HPF by the following
Today - HPF.Last_Date_Worked__c >=12 months

NOTE
For *A clinician has never worked*:_If Last Date Worked is blank, check the Company Signed Date (aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites,_

Sister sites relationship are captured in Account Account relatioship
Look for active contract that are older than a year, then see if the last date worked is blank

Check the same conditions for all other sites (using the AAR relationship) .. and if they are true we update
If any one of them do not satisfy the conditions( meaning active contract older than a year, but have the last date worked populated) we break/skip the update



Query all case and *child cases* belong to the practitioner and close them.

Query all task and *task related to child cases related to cases, child cases and clinician* and close them. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I view a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record *where the following is true:*

* If the HPF Status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive
* *A clinician hasn’t worked in a year*:
** Last Date Worked (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites that a clinician works at (Account field on HPF where status is not Prospect, Candidate, or Inactive)
* *A clinician has never worked*:
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) is blank, check the Company Signed Date (on Clinician Contract, aka Effective Date) on the Contract records for all sister sites
** If Last Date Worked (HPF) and Company Signed Date (Clinician Contract) are both blank, Hospital Privileged Date (HPF) is more than 12 months away for all sister sites

Then the HPF record is automatically updated with the following:

* Status = Inactive
* Credentialling Status = Inactive
* Termination Date = date when Last Date Worked is more than 12 months away

And the Clinician record is updated so that I-9 Status is blank

{color:#403294}*And all open cases, child cases, tasks related child cases, & tasks related to the clinician are updated to Status = Closed - built in* {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2436|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2436|smart-link]{color:#403294} {color}

_Note: Conga agreement records are terminated based on Status change to Inactive, requires the Date of when the automated inactivation happened_ 		10/Sep/25 4:52 PM   7 image-20250821-105158.png 31/Jul/25 4:22 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8, SCP Sprint 9 12/Aug/25 2:35 PM 1|i08pz4:qzzzzzzv 26/Mar/26 11:51 AM As a Data Quality team member, I need clinicians to be inactivated if they haven’t worked in 12 months, so that our clinician data is clean 21/Aug/25

Enhanced Clinician Inactivation: HPF Status Updates

# All Records in Shift: Shift__c where Contract__c = old Contract Id

# All Records in Contract Payment Agreement: ContractPaymentAgreement where ContractId = old Contract Id

No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1858, PR1050558-1914, PR1050558-2048 {color:#bf2600}Need to fix the logic on {color}[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link]{color:#bf2600} to pull the Healthcare Payer network from Corporate entity instead from Person Account.{color}

Record Triggered Flow (use existing flow when exists): When the HPF Record is Created/ Updated

# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *MD or DO* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE Physician Contract Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 1.a and Get *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *NP or PA* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE NP/PA Contracting Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 2.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *IF* HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Practitioner.Professional_Title__c = *RN or LPN* AND HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c = *Employee*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = EE RN/LPN Contracting Entity
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 3.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit
# *ELSE*
## Get ID from PartyRoleRelation WHERE PartyRoleRelation.RoleName = *Services Contracting Entity*
## Query for AccountAccountRelation.AccountId = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.AccountId AND AccountAccountRelation.PartyRoleRelationId = Id from Step 4.a
### When Record Found Update HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c = *AccountAccountRelation.RelatedAccountId*
### If No Record Found Do Nothing Exit



Update OWD:

* Public Read Only
** Healthcare Payer network
** Healthcare Provider
* Update Service Line



* Update Corporate Support permission set with Read access on Code Set object



Testing: Legal persona should be the one to setup the Corporate Entity and setup the Account Account Relationship 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter, Data Quality, or Enrollment Specialist user in the Corporate Support apps
When I create a HPF record (through automation from ATS Applicant or Create HPF experience)
Then the Healthcare Practitioner Facility record is populated with the *Contracting Corporate Entity* according to the logic below:

* Using the Facility Title on the HPF record, determine which Corporate Entity Account record to use. From the Account lookup on the HPF record, use Account Account Relationship to filter Service Account - Corporate Entity relationships based on the Party Role Relationships specified below:
** Clinician Professional Title = *MD or DO* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE Physician Contract Entity
** Clinician Professional Title = *NP or PA* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE NP/PA Contracting Entity
** Clinician Professional Title = *RN or LPN* AND Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) equals *Employee*
*** Party Role Relationship = EE RN/LPN Contracting Entity
** *All others* (Professional Title 6 with Facility Title (Code Set Sub Type) ≠ *Employee*)
*** Party Role Relationship = Services Contracting Entity
** If Account Account Relationship is not found, Contracting Corporate Entity is blank

NOTE: Based on the update listed above, for story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] we are now pulling the Healthcare Payer Network from Corporate Entity instead from Person Account.


Given I am a System Administrator

When I navigate to the OWD
Then the following objects shall be set to Public Read Write (internal only)

* Healthcare Payer Network (implemented in 1389)
* Healthcare Provider (implemented in 1389)
* Service Line 		28/Aug/25 12:22 PM   7 Captura de pantalla 2025-08-12 a la(s) 12.30.51 p.m..png 28/Jul/25 5:37 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 31/Jul/25 2:47 PM 1|i099yr:zzmzi 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Clinician Contracting Specialist, I need corporate entities to automatically be associated with clinicians and their potential facilities, so that I can create contracts with the right entities and limited manual effort 14/Aug/25

Automatic Corporate Entity Association at HPF Create

26/Aug/25 12:35 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider 360 Accepted   Medium ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-2203, PR1050558-2184, PR1050558-888, PR1050558-889, PR1050558-1653 harshgupta Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1334
No permission
 Samantha Fried PR1050558-1690, PR1050558-1691, PR1050558-1859, PR1050558-1915, PR1050558-2027 Refer poc_OnboardingData Integration procedure in the Demo environment as starting point to derive required logic for displaying section headers, status described in the attached reference document.

screenshot of wireframe from [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link] solution section

!image-20250815-225738.png|width=439,height=675,alt="image-20250815-225738.png"! 		0 Samantha Fried 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given an SCP Health user using the Corporate Support app,

when I navigate to a clinician’s “At A Glance” / Pizza Tracker component on their Person Account page,

Then the data displayed is deduced / displayed leveraging the following logic:

* No actual records are displayed within the component
* Sections displaying “Section Header” values from the reference doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - link below)
** Conditionally display and hide headers based on logic from reference doc (“Header Logic” tab - link below)
*** Section Header names will be concatenated to display what section is referring to (ex. Job Name or HPF Name) (“Header Logic” tab - link and example below)
** There will be a Section Header (“Applicant”) which are collapsible with Status / Label nested under it (see example below - horizontal view)
** Multiple section headers can be visible at the same time (ex. Applicant, Active, Onboarding can all be visible simultaneously)
* Icon values (Not Started, In Progress, Completed) are dynamically displayed based on the Logic in linked Reference Doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - columns F-H)
** Only one status per Status/Label are visible at a given time.
** The most “progressed” status is what is to be displayed
*** If Completed Logic = TRUE, display Completed icon
*** If In Progress Logic = TRUE and Completed = NOT TRUE, display In Progress icon
*** If Not Started Logic = TRUE OR (if no logic is documented AND Section Header is visible AND In Progress or Completed Logic = NOT TRUE), display Not Started icon

Given an external user using Experience Cloud,

when I navigate to my “At A Glance” / Pizza Tracker component on my home page,

Then the data displayed is deduced / displayed leveraging the following logic:

* No actual records are displayed within the component
* Sections displaying “Section Header” values from the reference doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - link below)
** Conditionally display and hide headers based on logic from reference doc (“Header Logic” tab - link below)
*** Section Header names will be concatenated to display what section is referring to (ex. Job Name or HPF Name) (“Header Logic” tab - link and example below)
** There will be a Section Header (e.g. “Applicant” ) that are collapsible with Status / Label nested under it (see example below - horizontal view) - see reference doc for headers and status/labels
** Multiple section headers can be visible at the same time (ex. Applicant, Active, Onboarding can all be visible simultaneously)
* Icon values (Not Started, In Progress, Completed) are dynamically displayed based on the Logic in linked Reference Doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - columns F-H)
** Only one status per Status/Label are visible at a given time.
** The most “progressed” status is what is to be displayed
*** If Completed Logic = TRUE, display Completed icon
*** If In Progress Logic = TRUE and Completed = NOT TRUE, display In Progress icon
*** If Not Started Logic = TRUE OR (if no logic is documented AND Section Header is visible AND In Progress or Completed Logic = NOT TRUE), display Not Started icon

NOTE:

* This story *does NOT include “Offboarding”.* Story in sprint 7 to configure Offboarding [+PR1050558-1653+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1653]

[Reference Document|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B33134674-E4BE-48B4-8030-9BA2976BB6CC%7D&file=SCP%20Health%20-%20HPF%20Pizza%20Tracker.xlsx&fromShare=true&action=default&mobileredirect=true]

PIZZA TRACKER:

UI - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link]

Display Responsiveness - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|smart-link]

Status Logic - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|smart-link] 		26/Aug/25 12:35 PM   6 image-20250815-150623.png 27/Jul/25 4:34 PM SCP Sprint 7 31/Jul/25 3:10 PM 1|i099yr:zzwwi 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a system, I need to deduce the status of a given clinician related to a number of documented areas, so that able to know where they’re at in the process with SCP without navigating to multiple records. 13/Aug/25

Clinician "At a Glance" Status Calculation

None
20/Aug/25
26/Aug/25 12:22 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-1174 gagandeep.singh2 Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1317
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1455, PR1050558-1456, PR1050558-1441, PR1050558-1442, PR1050558-1641 Use Employment_Type to know if Contract will be IC or EE.

Query ALL the active Contracts for the given Clinician. Per following Diagram we Query using the Person Account Id in Contract object.

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 9.20.17 p.m..png|width=392,height=222,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 9.20.17 p.m..png"!



DON’T USE Clinician__c for this.

Check if Employment Type are different and one is EE and the other IC.

IF previous condition is true, set the Start Date from new Contract using End Date of Active Contract.



Create a flow on the Contract Request that runs when the Contract.Status = 'Executed' that updates all Provider Network Contract and Contract Payment Agreements where the Contract is the previous one and set the ContractId to the new ContractId. In order to get the old Contract we query using clinicianId, employment type and the end date should be the start date of the new one.

In order to CLONE facilities

# query for all HPF for active Contract. Do this query using PNC.
# Remove the HPF Id and, and save.
# Create PNC records, for all the HPF’s from 2. and for the new Contract. 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project {color:#403294}*I Cannot Have EE and IC Contracts Active at Same Time*{color}

Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician record and select Contract Request
Then I am able to select facilities as built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link]

When I request a contract for EE when an IC contract is active (and vice versa), then the End Date on the Active IC contract is populated with the Start Date of the EE contract

_Note (built in_ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1389|smart-link] and [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] _): When a Clinician Contract is created and they already have an active contract, clone all facility associations and their rates for the recruiter to manually adjust as needed_

Active = Status of “Executed” 		26/Aug/25 12:22 PM   4 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-30 a la(s) 9.20.17 p.m..png 24/Jul/25 2:16 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 29/Jul/25 2:17 PM 1|i099yk:8v 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need the clinician contract request to accurately prevent facility titles where employment type is EE/IC are active at the same time, so that our SCP business process rules are enforced.

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1422, PR1050558-1423, PR1050558-1592 Initiate Early Onboarding is triggered from OS ClinicianManualOnboardingOS. From what I found current DM only queries Prospect status (this is the ONLY change). We need to add other Status (*_New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved_*)

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-29 a la(s) 7.53.26 p.m..png|width=50%,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-29 a la(s) 7.53.26 p.m..png"!

Cases are retrieved via following DM (nothing to do here).

Filter HPF based on: PNC record → Contract status = (*_New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved_*) 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support App
When I navigate to a *clinician* person account record
Then I can click on the *Initiate Early Onboarding* button
Then I am presented with the following:

* +Check if a Contract has been requested+: if this clinician does not have a Contract record where Status = New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved, then I am presented with the following message: “This clinician does not have a requested contract. We cannot initiate early onboarding. Please discuss with the recruiter for this clinician’s facility.”

_And I am able to populate the following:_

* _What onboarding type needs to start early?_
** _Facility specific, SCP, or both_
* +_If facility specific or both_+_: select from a list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility records (display Status field) without existing onboarding cases_ *_(filter HPF based on Contract Status = New, Draft, Submitted, or Approved)_*
** If no Healthcare Practitioner Facility record meet the criteria then display the following message: This clinician has an open Facility Onboarding case. Please review existing onboarding case.
* +_If SCP or both_+_: there can only be one open SCP onboarding case at a time_
* +_For all_+_: indicate priority for SCP onboarding and each selected HPF (default to Medium)_

_And upon clicking Finish, the system should direct the user back to the Clinician record_

NOTE: SCP Onboarding message is part of story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-835|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-835|smart-link] 		14/Aug/25 10:15 AM   5 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-29 a la(s) 7.53.26 p.m..png 23/Jul/25 3:50 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 29/Jul/25 3:59 PM 1|i099yk:8 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, Enrollment Specialist, Data Quality team member, I need to select from a list of open contract, so I have a refined list of Healthcare Practitioner Facility to perform early onboarding. 01/Aug/25

Create a Task, with WhoId - Clinician, Whatid - the Risk review Case record


* Subject: Risk Review - Assess Clinical Match
* Description: Assess if clinical match is needed or should be adjusted 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps

Then the following shall happen:

* Update Healthcare Practitioner Facility records where the Risk Review case(s) are Not Approved, to Status = “Inactive”
* Create a Task for Clinical Match Queue

ContractRequest OS structure is following:

!Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png|width=1108,height=540,alt="Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png"!

We modify Clinician_UpdateClinicianHPF to add a new Data Mapper that creates a contract if the Employment_Type__c of the HPF is Locum or Leased. Create as well the Provider Network Contract linking correctly the HPF with the Contract in the newly created PNC.
New introduced components to create Contract,PNCs should be reused in the story 1070 as well.



Security Matrix - tab = Permission Set Group

* For Permission Set Group = *Data Quality*
** Add Permission Set = Manage Clinician Contracts

[~accountid:61c036c29ee70a0068954daf] [~accountid:60c70906758a5d006aa9dba6] is it possible to have a virtual work in which then the clinician can select 2 HPF at the same time? or is it correct the Assumption that it will only work at an HPF so there will always be only one contract?

When I navigate to a clinician record
And I am able to select the Contract Request button in the highlights panel
And the following happens:

* Facility Selection screen built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-893|smart-link]
* Skip Contract Confirmation built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-892|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-892|smart-link]

And User clicks “Finish”
Then the system shall

* Update the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility records with the “Effective From” date that the user confirmed or updated.
* A Contract record (Record Type = Clinician) is created as defined in the solution
* A Provider Network Contract record is created as defined in the solution
* User shall be navigated back to new Clinician Contract record’s Summary tab. 		14/Aug/25 10:24 AM   4 Captura de pantalla 2025-07-26 a la(s) 1.53.52 p.m..png 21/Jul/25 6:00 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 23/Jul/25 12:33 PM 1|i099yk:8uy 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need to create a “Contract” for leased and locums clinicians, so that we can move clinicians from initial data entry to onboarding 01/Aug/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1471, PR1050558-1472, PR1050558-1609 Update the Record Page and Page Layout 0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I navigate to a *Clinician Intake Form* record
Then I am able see:

* Header
** Subject is displayed - no additional fields in highlights panel below
* Main Region
** Tabs component: Details (Default), Responses, Files
*** Details tab: fields are displayed according to data dictionary
**** *Add fields to Additional Details section:*
***** Date/Time Opened
***** Date/Time Closed
**** *Add field to the System Information section:*
***** Case Number
*** Responses tab: assessment related list (will hold responses from the Intake Form guided experience)
*** Files tab: standard files related list

NOTE: This story makes updates to original page configuration made in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-827|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-827|smart-link]


Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison or Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support App
When I navigate to a *Risk Review case* record
Then I am able to see:

* Header
** Subject is displayed in the top line
** Priority, Status, and Case Number are displayed as well

* Main Region
** Tabs component: Details (Default), Responses, Related, Files
*** Details tab: fields are displayed according to data dictionary
**** *Add fields to Additional Details section*:
***** Date/Time Opened
***** Date/Time Closed
**** *Add field to the System Information section*:
***** Case Number
*** Responses tab: assessment related list (see Risk Review case for reference)
*** Related tab: Approval Trace component (displays Approval History)
*** Files tab: standard files related list
* Right Region
** Approval Work Item

NOTE: This story makes updates to original page configuration made in[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-421|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-421|smart-link] & [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-903|smart-link] 		13/Aug/25 1:21 PM   4 image-20250806-082953.png 21/Jul/25 12:22 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 28/Jul/25 1:28 PM 1|i099yk:7i 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Corporate Support user, for cases Clinician Intake Form and Risk Review cases that I have visibility to I need to see additional information, so that I can see when a case was open, closed and the case number. 06/Aug/25

26/Aug/25 12:39 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low AgreementApprovalProcess, ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1715, PR1050558-1808, PR1050558-1812, PR1050558-1807, PR1050558-2078, PR1050558-2822, PR1050558-4073, PR1050558-894, PR1050558-1109, PR1050558-1389, PR1050558-2089, PR1050558-2210 nawal.bedmutha Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1110
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1473, PR1050558-1474, PR1050558-1600 Follow solution as described in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = *Leadership Incentives* and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

Reuse all the components listed there, make sure all components are parameterized to query the required data. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And clicked on the *Contract Request* button
And I completed the process for a net new contract (current contract rates NOT copied over) or Start From Previous Active Contract (as defined in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract
Then for each HPF I have the ability to click on the *Configure Rates* button
And when I select the Configure Rates button:

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, Variable, Target, Bonus, *Leadership Incentives*
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Leadership Incentives* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:39 PM   5 21/Jul/25 11:43 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 1:23 PM 1|i099yr:zz6zx 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 04/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Leadership Incentives

None

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = Stipend and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** *Stipend*, Shift, Variable, Target, Bonus, Leadership Incentives
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Stipend* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
**** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:40 PM   5 21/Jul/25 11:24 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 1:25 PM 1|i099yr:zz6zi 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 04/Aug/25

Clinician Contract Request: Stipend Rates

None

Reuse all the components listed there, make sure all components are parameterized to query the required data. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And clicked on the *Contract Request* button
And I completed the process for a net new contract (current contract rates NOT copied over) or Start From Previous Active Contract (as defined in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract
Then for each HPF I have the ability to click on the *Configure Rates* button
And when I select the Configure Rates button:

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, *Variable*, Target, Bonus, Leadership Incentives
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Variable* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
*** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:40 PM   4 21/Jul/25 11:21 AM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 22/Jul/25 1:22 PM 1|i099yr:zz6x 29/Jan/26 9:08 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 04/Aug/25

26/Aug/25 12:40 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low AgreementApprovalProcess, ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1715, PR1050558-1808, PR1050558-1812, PR1050558-1783, PR1050558-1807, PR1050558-2078, PR1050558-2822, PR1050558-2614, PR1050558-894, PR1050558-1070, PR1050558-1108, PR1050558-1389, PR1050558-2089, PR1050558-2210 nawal.bedmutha Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1103
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1484, PR1050558-1485, PR1050558-1597 Follow solution as described in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-194|smart-link]

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = Target and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

Reuse all the components listed there, make sure all components are parameterized to query the required data. 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps

And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, Variable, *Target*, Bonus, Leadership Incentives
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated (nice to have)
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Target* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
*** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated (nice to have)
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously

26/Aug/25 12:34 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Portal Accepted   Low ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1941, PR1050558-890 abhi.kondreddy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-891
