 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1252, PR1050558-1498, PR1050558-1499 * Use a flex card to display each ATS Applicant record.
* For each ATS Applicant record that should be a button *Withdraw Application*
* When the user clicks on the Individual button show the message as specific in AC
* Update the ATS record with the details specific in AC
* Security Matrix updates:
** Tab = Permission Set
*** Permission Set = Portal User
**** Add Edit access to the following object:
***** *ATS Applicant*
**** Add Read & Edit access to the following object:
***** *Healthcare Practitioner Facility* 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician in the Prospect Portal
If I have an ATS Applicant record where Status = Active
Then I am able to see the following:

* My Applications
** List of ATS Applicant records where Applicant = my person account record
** And when I click the Job field, then I can see the following:
*** *Withdraw Application button*

Given I am a Clinician in the Prospect Portal

If I have an ATS Applicant record where Status = Active
And I click the Withdraw Application button
Then the following happens

* Confirmation Screen
** User can see the following message “Are you sure you want to withdraw your application to [Job Name]? This action cannot be undone.”
** User is required to select *Withdrawal Reason* (single select picklist)
*** If Other is selected, user must populate Other Reason
** Navigation Options
*** Cancel - close out the window, no updates made
*** Next with checking the checkbox - the following updates are made:
* Automated Updates
** ATS Applicant record
*** Status = *Rejected*
*** Declined Reason = *Candidate Declined*
*** Declined Detail = [what user selected]
*** Other Reason = [what user populated]
** Healthcare Practitioner Facility record (where Practitioner Facility Name = Account Name from Job record AND Practitioner = Applicant from ATS Applicant record)
*** Status = *Inactive*

NOTE: if in the event the update fails then a message will display with a finish button: There was an error while processing the request, please contact the system administrator.



----

Withdrawal Reason

* Accepted Another Position
* Benefits Package Not Competitive
* Clinical Scope Not Aligned with My Skills or Interests
* Compensation Package Not Competitive
* Concerns about Practice Culture, Stability, or Reputation
* Contract Terms (Non-Financial) Not Acceptable
* Credentialing Process Too Burdensome
* Decided to Stay at Current Position
* Licensing or Visa Complications
* Location Not Desirable
* Negative Interview Experience
* No Longer Seeking a New Opportunity
* Organization’s Values Not Aligned with Mine
* Personal Circumstances Have Changed
* Poor Communication During Recruitment
* Practice Model Not a Good Fit
* Prefer Not to Disclose
* Process Taking Too Long
* Scheduling Expectations Not Acceptable
* Other 		26/Aug/25 12:34 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 2.41.01 PM.png 14/Jul/25 10:30 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 04/Aug/25 5:41 AM dark_blue 1|i099yr:v 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Prospective Clinician, I need to view information about my open applications in HC portal, so that I can understand the latest status and see important information about the job 05/Aug/25

Clinician Application Withdrawal - HC Portal

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1692, PR1050558-1693, PR1050558-1865, PR1050558-1921, PR1050558-2025



Screenshot is current state solution

!image-20250714-235326.png|width=416,height=548,alt="image-20250714-235326.png"!

Refer Wireframes attached to story, Wireframes provide two views - One Vertical and One Horizontal View. Please note Legend is missing in Horizontal view (refer Vertical view to add it) and this UI needs to be built in Horizontal view. Use Demo environment to learnt more about structure of flexcards and reuse components for building UI for this story.

!Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.19 PM.png|width=906,height=192,alt="Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.19 PM.png"!

!Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.28 PM.png|width=908,height=158,alt="Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.28 PM.png"!

!Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.51 PM.png|width=917,height=232,alt="Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.51 PM.png"!

!Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.42 PM.png|width=922,height=679,alt="Screenshot 2025-08-04 at 9.17.42 PM.png"!

Component composition:

!Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg|width=3986,height=2531,alt="Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg"! 		0 Samantha Fried 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given a user of the system,
when I navigate to the Person Account Clinician record At a Glance tab,
Then I see a component with the following details:

* Titled “At a Glance” (see wireframe)
* A key/legend directly below it (see wireframe)
** Grey Circle Icon “Not Started”
** Blue + White Circle Icon “In Progress”
** Green Circle with Check Icon “Completed”
* Sections displaying “Section Header” values from the reference doc (“Status Label + Logic” tab - link below)
** Multiple Section Headers can be visible at the same time
** Sections have accordion feature (collapse / expand)
** Status/Label values (internal/-external-) visible nested under Section Headers only when section header is available
** Icons from the legend are available below the Status/Label value (see wireframe in the solution)
** In Onboarding and Offboarding sections, Internal is visible above Facility

Note:

* This story *does NOT include “Offboarding”.* Story in sprint 7 to configure Offboarding [+PR1050558-1653+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1653]
* Wireframe available in Figma document (link below)

[Reference Document|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B33134674-E4BE-48B4-8030-9BA2976BB6CC%7D&file=SCP%20Health%20-%20HPF%20Pizza%20Tracker.xlsx&fromShare=true&action=default&mobileredirect=true]
[Wireframe|https://www.figma.com/design/FJWylko14sNox4yK7t0zrD/SCP-Health---Pizza-Tracker?node-id=0-1&p=f&t=VvuGg3fDOgjIscGF-0]

PIZZA TRACKER:

UI - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link]

Display Responsiveness - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|smart-link]

Status Logic - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|smart-link] 		26/Aug/25 12:36 PM   7 Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg 14/Jul/25 7:54 PM SCP Sprint 7 31/Jul/25 3:10 PM 1|i099yr:zzww 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a user, I need the ability to view a component that highlights the status(es) of a clinician, so that I am able to understand where they are during their journey with SCP Health.

Clinician "At a Glance" UI

None
20/Aug/25
26/Aug/25 12:41 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider 360 Accepted   Low ReadyForSprint, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-1334, PR1050558-889, PR1050558-1653 soomjeet.sahoo Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-888
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1694, PR1050558-1695, PR1050558-1866, PR1050558-1922, PR1050558-2028 This story is enhancement on top of 889 to show tracker view for Internal vs External User. Refer Column D and F for showing which statuses and what labels are visible for each group of users.

Filter Data in the data sources IPs of Flexcards when data is returned from Server for rendering.

# User ProfileName to distinguish between Internal vs External user.
# Find AccountId from User Record when UI accessed by External User.

Refer attached component structure diagram for more details:



!Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg|width=3986,height=2531,alt="Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg"!





Screenshot is *current state* solution

!image-20250714-235326.png|width=416,height=548,alt="image-20250714-235326.png"!

Screenshot of wireframe from UI story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link] Solution section


!image-20250815-225738.png|width=439,height=675,alt="image-20250815-225738.png"!

Update Permission in *Portal User permission set and add sharing sets for Case and Interview.*

*Contract* - R

# Sent_Date__c - R


*Case* - R

# RecordTypeName__c
# Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c
# Subject
# Type
# ParentId
# ContactId
# AccountId

*HPF* -

# Hospital_Privileged_Date__c
# Hospital_Application_Sent_On__c
# Hospital_Application_Sent_Date__c
# Hospital_Application_Received_Date__c

*Applicants*

# StageType - *New Field* - *R* *_(Updated in DD)_*

*Interview* - *R*

# bpats__ATS_Applicant__c
# bpats__Location_Type__c
# bpats__Status__c
# bpats__Job__c

*Contact* - R

# AccountId 		0 Samantha Fried 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I a SCP Corporate Support user using the Corporate Support App,
When I navigate to a clinician’s Person Account record,
Then I am able to

* View “Status / Label (Internal)” under the Section Headers from the “Status Label + Logic” tab when a Section Header is visible
** Values in “Status / Label (External)” IS NOT VISIBLE TO INTERNAL USERS



Given I am external Experience Cloud user,
When I navigate to my home page,
Then I am able to

* View “Status / Label (External)” under the Section Headers from the “Status Label + Logic” tab when a Section Header is visible
** Values in “Status / Label (Internal)” IS NOT VISIBLE TO EXTERNAL USERS
* If candidate is no longer in consideration for a given job but other applications are still active / header still available, remove that line from visibility



NOTE:

* External Users will have a different UI/user story to view the details of their specific applications, interviews, etc.
* This story *does NOT include “Offboarding”.* Story in sprint 7 to configure Offboarding [+PR1050558-1653+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1653]

[Reference Document|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B33134674-E4BE-48B4-8030-9BA2976BB6CC%7D&file=SCP%20Health%20-%20HPF%20Pizza%20Tracker.xlsx&fromShare=true&action=default&mobileredirect=true]

PIZZA TRACKER:

UI - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-889|smart-link]

Display Responsiveness - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-888|smart-link]

Status Logic - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1334|smart-link]
26/Aug/25 12:41 PM   6 Clinician-LDD - Tracker (1).jpeg 14/Jul/25 7:53 PM SCP Sprint 7 31/Jul/25 3:09 PM 1|i099yr:zzwwr 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a system, I need to display “pizza tracker” values based on component location so that I can ensure that internal audiences (internal SCP Console users) are seeing internal values and external audiences (Experience Cloud users) are seeing different, limited values. 19/Aug/25

Clinician “At a Glance” Display Responsive based on Audience

26/Aug/25 12:37 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Recruiting Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-4980, PR1050558-5090, PR1050558-5519, PR1050558-2163, PR1050558-5091, PR1050558-5617, PR1050558-2130, PR1050558-2119 mario.miki Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-823

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-921, PR1050558-922, PR1050558-1246, PR1050558-1430 Create a record triggered flow

Check if there is a HPF already associated ATS Applicant (bpats_ATS_Applicant_c.Id = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Job_Applicant__c)

If Exists do Nothing

If Not then Create a HPF record based on mapping in AC 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I update the *ATS Stage* field on an *ATS Applicant* record to *Offer*
Then a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record is automatically created with the following attributes:

||*Healthcare Practitioner Facility field*||*value to populate*||
|Practitioner Facility Name|ATS Applicant > Job > Account Name (formula)|
|Practitioner|ATS Applicant > Applicant (lookup - contact)|
|Account|ATS Applicant > Job > Account (lookup - account)|
|Facility Title|ATS Applicant > Job > Facility Title (lookup)|
|Status|Prospect|
|Time Type|ATS Applicant > Job > Planned Status
_On Call and Locums are not on Job but on HPF_|
|Job Applicant|ATS Applicant (Id)|

ATS Applicant object = bpats_ATS_Applicant_c

Job object = bpats_Job_c

_This automation copies information from the Job on the ATS Applicant record. Any changes must be completed prior to changing the ATS Stage to Offer Term Sheet._ 		26/Aug/25 12:37 PM   9 08/Jul/25 6:00 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 15/Jul/25 4:56 PM 1|i099yr:zy 16/Feb/26 3:40 PM As a Recruiter, I need Healthcare Practitioner Facility records to be automatically created when I associate an applicant to a job, so that I can avoid duplicate work when a clinician is tied to a specific location

Create HPF from Job

None

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2075, PR1050558-2076, PR1050558-2058 this requirement came from creating Provider Network Contract for client contracts

Create a record trigger flow to create the Healthcare Provider object as mentioned. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console apps
When I *create a Service Account* record (Account, record type = Service Account)
Then a Healthcare Provider record is created with the following attributes:

* Healthcare Provider Name = name from Account record
* Account = lookup to Account record 		28/Aug/25 12:22 PM   5 07/Jul/25 6:26 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 29/Jul/25 4:44 PM 1|i099yr:zzmzzzzi 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a System Administrator, I need to automatically generate Healthcare Provider records in Salesforce, so that business users do not need to manually create additional records to satisfy the Health Cloud data model 18/Aug/25

Automatically Create Healthcare Provider Records - Client

None
19/Aug/25
26/Aug/25 6:20 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Offboarding Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Kristi Bouillion   PR1050558-6348, PR1050558-306, PR1050558-6023 abhi.kondreddy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-701
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1870, PR1050558-1926, PR1050558-2052 Use Omniscript ( where this is first screen) ,to display list of HPF records that are not inactive
Display the records as a edit block (check box) list.
Display the fields on HPF Name , HPF Status__c, Last_Date_Worked__c
(Query HPF records using PractitionerId as the link to the Clinician)
If all records are selected, then display additional checkbox “Full SCP Termination”
The records that are selected are shown in the next screen (PR1050558-306)

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1871, PR1050558-1927, PR1050558-2046 Use a record triggered flow (reuse existing flow if possible) on Task
When task status is updated to ‘Completed’, and the related Case is of record type “*Clinician Onboarding*” ( and its a parent case)
Get all child tasks of the Case and check if the status is Completed.
Parent Id = CaseId of the triggering Task record
Status != Closed
Decision : Check if count of Get records is 0
Then update the Parent Case record’s status

Similar logic for checking all Child cases of Parent Case of record type “*Clinician Onboarding*”

When I navigate to the Contracts tab
Then I can see the following list views:

* All Contracts
** Filters: none
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Record Type, Contract Owner Alias
* All Client Contracts
** Filters: Contract Record Type = Client
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Owner Alias
* All Clinician Contracts
** Filters: Contract Record Type = Clinician
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Owner Alias
* All CPA Contracts
** Filters: Contract Record Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Owner Alias
* My Client Contracts
** Owner = My Contracts
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Record Type
* All Clinician Contracts - Approved
** Filters: Contract Record Type = Clinician, Status = Approved
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Employment Type, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Approval Date, Contract Owner Alias
* {color:#bf2600}-Unassigned Clinician Contracts - Approved-{color}{color:#bf2600} (moved to 1809){color}
** {color:#bf2600}-Filters: Contract Record Type = Clinician, Status = Approved, Owner = Clinician Contracting Queue-{color}
** {color:#bf2600}-Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Employment Type, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Approval Date, Contract Owner-{color}
* My Clinician Contracts - Approved
** Filters: Contract Record Type = Clinician, Status = Approved, Owner = My Contracts
** Fields to display: Contract Number, Account Name, Employment Type, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Approval Date

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1876, PR1050558-1932, PR1050558-2029, PR1050558-2437 # Create a button *Open Shift APAY* in HealthcarePractitionerFacility object and add it to the record page
# Use Screen Flow
## Contract record: Contract.Status = ‘Executed’ and Contract.Employment_Type__c = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title__r.Code_Set_Sub_Type__c LIMIT 1
### Store the Contract ID
## If No Record Found Then
## If Record Found Then
### Display Fields
#### Start Date/Time (date/time, required) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### End Date/Time (date/time, required) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Shift Duration (Start Date/Time - End Date/Time) (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Lists all records from PreventiveCareAgreement record with ContractPaymentAgreement.Type = Shift and user can choose one record
##### Name: PreventiveCareAgreement.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c
### Next
### Show the select a Shift record with
#### Facility Rate: PreventiveCareAgreement.Facility Level Rate (new field on PreventiveCareAgreementsee data dictionary )
#### Clinician Rate: PreventiveCareAgreement.Rate__c
#### Remaining Open Shifts: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### % of Clinicians Contracted to Work: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Reason for Shift Bonus (new field on Case data dictionary )
####* {color:#bf2600}we can use a picklist if there is a standard list of possible reasons{color}
#### Bonus Amount: (new field on Case data dictionary )
#### Bonus Unit of Measure : Picklist values: per Hour, per Shift (new field on Case data dictionary )
### Save
#### Create a Case Record with RT: Rate Approval, Type = Open Shift APAY and all fields as per Data Dictionary
##### Subject = Rate Approval
# Persona: *Scheduler & Clinician Experience Specialist,*
## Add Permission set = Manage Clinician Contracts
## Case Record Type = Rate Approval
### Permission set = Manage Clinician Onboarding



Note capturing date time and displaying the list of shift have no dependencies. Per the AC we don’t currently have filters. Display a list of Shifts from Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then I am able to select the *Open Shift APAY* button in the header
And the following displays: 

* Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title
** When no records are available, display the following message “No Active Contract is Available for this Clinician”
* Shift Selection
** Shift Start Date/Time (date/time, required)
** Shift End Date/Time (date/time, required)
** Shift Duration (formula based on fields above)
** Once Start Date/Time and End Date/Time are populated:
*** Display a list of Shifts from Clinician Contracts where status = Executed and Employment Type = Employment Type related to HPF Facility Title
** _Navigation Options_
*** Next
* Incentive Details
** Display the Shift selected in previous screen
** Facility Rate (formula based on client contract, for the selected shift)
** Clinician Rate (formula based on clinician contract, for the selected shift)
** Remaining Open Shifts (number, required)
*** Help Text: How many remain after getting this shift request approved
** % of Clinicians Contracted to Work (percentage 3 digits and 0 decimal points, required)
*** Help Text: FSR %
** Reason for Shift Bonus (picklist, required)
*** Picklist values: Abrupt Removal of Provider, Admin Reasons, Call Off, Core Provider Needed, Higher Hourly Rate, Holiday Pay Extra, New Start-Up, Shift Travel-Expenses, Surge/Additional Coverage, Tiered Bonus
** Bonus Amount (currency 5 digits and 2 decimal points, required)
** Bonus Unit of Measure (picklist, required)
*** Picklist values: per Hour, per Shift
** Comments (free text, required)
** _Navigation Options_
*** Cancel (“X” icon)
**** Returns to Healthcare Practitioner Facility record and no Case records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Shift Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Save
**** Creates new Case record as specified in the solution
***** Case Record Type = Rate Approval
***** Type = Open Shift APAY
**** Returns the user to the Healthcare Practitioner Facility record 		29/Aug/25 10:36 AM   7 12/Jun/25 6:35 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 8 10/Aug/25 12:17 PM 1|i099yr:zzj 08/Apr/26 5:08 PM As a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler, I need to request shift-specific bonus approval in Salesforce, so that I can offer appropriate incentives for clinicians to work a hard-to-staff shift 18/Aug/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1879, PR1050558-1935, PR1050558-2034 Add a button *Submit Contract Request* in Contract page and display the button when Contract.Status = Draft and Contract.RecordType = Clinician



h2. *Use Autolaunched Orchestrator (no trigger) Approval Flow process*

*Step 1:*

# *IF Contract.RecordType = Clinician and Employment Type = Employee* THEN
## Look for all records from HealthcarePractitionerFacility (Contract> PNC > HPF) HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c if all records
### IF Contracting_Corporate_Entity__c is not the same for all records THEN
ensure ApprovalSubmission record and ApprovalWorkItem records are autocreated
#### -Create ApprovalSubmission record with default field-
##### -RelatedRecordId= Contract.Id-
#### -Create ApprovalWorkItem record-
##### -AssignedToId = Queue Id- *-Corporate Entity Mismatch Queue (Created in-* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1703|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1703|smart-link] -)-
#### User need to manually update Contract record with the correct Corporate Entity

*Step 2:*

# If Contract.Contract_Special_Terms__c is not blank then
## Create ApprovalSubmission record with default field
### RelatedRecordId= [Contract.Id|http://Contract.Id]
## Create ApprovalWorkItem record
### AssignedToId = Queue Id *Tactical Team Queue*

Flow Continues in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1750|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1750|smart-link] 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I have specified all necessary rates through the Contract Request experience
Then I can select *Submit Contract Request* on the Summary tab of the Contract record (only when Status = Draft)

And the following happens:

* If HPFs have *more than one Contracting Corporate Entity* (if Contract has more than one (different) Contracting Corporate Entity) AND *Employment Type = Employee*
** Contract record updates to Status = Submitted
** Contract record is NOT locked from being edited
** Approval Work Item records are created for the following approvers:
*** *Corporate Entity Mismatch Queue*
*** and one user in the queue can approve or reject the Contract
* If there are *special terms*
* Approval Types *special terms*
** Contract record updates to Status = Submitted
** Contract record is NOT locked from being edited
** Approval Work Item records are created for the following approvers for the contract:
*** *Tactical Team Queue*
*** and one user in the queue can approve or reject the Contract
* -If any- *-clinician rates do not match facility rates-*
** -Contract record updates to Status = Submitted-
** -Contract record is NOT locked from being edited-
* If any *clinician rates do not match facility rates*
** This is built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1750|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1750|smart-link]
* If multiple steps are required, they occur in parallel and all are required
* If *none of the above criteria are met*
** Contract record updates to Status = Approved
* Approve/Reject Actions
** When users approve/reject they can add comments
** Send Final notification (Rejected or approved) to request submitter and all approvers with comments
** Contract Status updated to Approved
** If Contract is not approved

*** Defect Analysis - Start Date
*** Defect Analysis - Complete Date
*** Send Request & Release form
*** Perform PSL2 - Start Date
*** Reference Verification Review
*** Perform PSL2 - Complete Date

*** Send Hospital Application to Clinician

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1519, PR1050558-1520, PR1050558-1255, PR1050558-1321, PR1050558-1396, PR1050558-1795 Add Health Cloud Records -[ tab Code Set (Bonus)|https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1B6WddJnXHDZD5kx5F1mZDqEvcAwYn1wCPejZ0ZgJpP0/edit?gid=287559019#gid=287559019]

Summary screen will be built in story 894 which will expose *Configure Rates* button in context of each Facility (which are part of Draft Contract).

When user clicks Configure Rates button - launch existing OmniScript Clinician_ConfigureRates_English.

The cloning process should work like below

# Using the Parent Contract (ParentContractId) in Contract
# Use the AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from current selection to get the same AccountId and PractitionerId and Facility_Title__c from Previous Contract (identified by ParentContractId)
## When a HPF was found in the Previous Contract Copy All *Contract Payment Agreement* with Rate Type = Bonus and all related child *Preventive Care Agreement* *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Cloned From = (Parent Clinician Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Parent Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate
## When a HPF was not found in earlier contract or a new Contract then copy the rates from the Client Contract *_all fields copied exactly as is_*
### *Contract Payment Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Contract Payment Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Facility Rate = (_Client Contract_) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Id
### *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate = (Client Contract) *Preventive Care Agreement*.Rate

!image-20250729-020635.png|width=703,height=663,alt="image-20250729-020635.png"!



Make following enhancements in the existing OmniScript

# Pass Current Contract Id and Current Facility in context as parameters
# Build new IP ContractRate_GetRates to get Rates, check following images for details
# Create records - use Data Dictionary regarding fields details and Contract structure diagram to understand the relationship.

!Clinician-LDD - Component-Design-V2.jpeg|width=5813,height=4254,alt="Clinician-LDD - Component-Design-V2.jpeg"!
!Clinician-LDD - V2-Contract-Request-Flow.jpeg|width=5834,height=5625,alt="Clinician-LDD - V2-Contract-Request-Flow.jpeg"!


!Clinician-LDD - Contract-Structure.jpeg|width=7038,height=5475,alt="Clinician-LDD - Contract-Structure.jpeg"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* record
And clicked on the *Contract Request* button
And I completed the process for a net new contract (current contract rates NOT copied over) or Start From Previous Active Contract (as defined in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1070|smart-link] )
And I am on *Clinician Contract’s Summary tab* ([https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-894|smart-link])
And I can see all the Healthcare Practitioner Facilities (HPF) associated with the Contract {color:#ff991f}filtered by Contract Employment Type and the HPF Facility Title lookup code set Employment Type. (Sakthi: Added this condition to filter the HPF) {color}
Then for each HPF I have the ability to click on the *Configure Rates* button
And when I select the Configure Rates button:

* Rate Selection
** Single-select list for types of rates to configure:
*** Stipend, Shift, Variable, Target, *Bonus*, Leadership Incentives
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Next
* Rate Details
** When *Bonus* was selected, I can see the rates for the selected Type of Rate:
*** If rates exist, then the user will see the existing rates displayed
*** If rates do NOT exist, the user will see pre-determined Facility Rates from the Account for the selected Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
**** System automatically filters rates based on the Facility Title in the HPF record
**** Based on Contract Start Date, filter Facility Contract Payment Agreement rates that are applicable on that Start Date.
*** User is able to de-select rates that do not apply to this clinician
** {color:#0747a6}User has the ability to add Additional Bonuses to One Facility. [Split the enforce of 1 facility to story {color}[{color:#0747a6}+PR1050558-2086+{color}|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2086]{color:#0747a6}]{color}
*** Help Text: Enter the bonus to the facility at which they are primarily working.
*** Able to add additional bonuses from the following based on the Employment Type noted in parenthesis: (Employment Type comes from the HPF)
**** Sign On Bonus (Only for IC)
**** Commencement Bonus (Can be EE or IC)
**** Relocation Bonus (Can be EE or IC)
**** New Grad Bonus (Only for EE NP/PA)
**** Retention Bonus (Can be EE or IC)
**** Locums Buyout (Can be EE or IC)
**** Other Bonus (Can be EE or IC)
** Account Name, Type, Rate, and Unit of Measure
** I am able to update the Rate (only when Override Prohibited is unchecked) or leave it with the existing value ( [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-839|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-839|smart-link] )
*** User is not able to change the Rate to 0 or a negative number
** Navigation buttons
*** Cancel
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab and no records were created or updated
*** Previous
**** Returns to Rate Selection screen with the updates that the user made previously
*** Finish
**** Returns to Clinician Contract’s Summary tab

When I finish the guided experience

Then the system shall create the appropriate Contract Payment Agreement & Preventive Care Agreement records as specified in the solution. 		26/Aug/25 12:41 PM   6 Clinician-LDD - Component-Design-V2.jpeg 23/May/25 12:27 PM SCP Sprint 7, SCP Sprint 6 13/Jun/25 6:03 AM 1|i099yr:zz3 16/Apr/26 1:34 PM As a Recruiter, I need to request approval for clinician compensation, so that I can offer appropriate pay and incentives for clinicians to join SCP 06/Aug/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1883, PR1050558-1939, PR1050558-2042 3 rich text components on Clinical Person Account lightning record page dynamically displayed based on Clinical Match Group field value

Create three rich text component on lightning record page.
*Rich text 1*
*Label* : Clinical Match Group 4 Text
*Content*:
DECEASED CLINICIAN
If believe this is an error, please contact Salesforce Data Quality at [DL.SalesForceDQ@scphealth.com|mailto:DL.SalesForceDQ@scphealth.com]
*Background* *color*: grey
*Placement*: top of the right section and above the tabs component
*Component* *Visibility*: Clinical Match Group = 4

*Rich text 2*
*Label* : Clinical Match Group 3 Text
*Content:*
APPROVAL REQUIRED
Contact Risk and Legal at [RM@SCPHealth.com|mailto:RM@SCPHealth.com]
If this provider calls you, state the following: _“I see that you have been in the system previously. Let me pull your file, review it with the appropriate personnel and call you back soon.”_
*Background color:* Red
*Placement*: below the header and above the tabs component
*Component* *Visibility*: Clinical Match Group = 3

*Rich text 3*
*Label* : Clinical Match Group 2 Text
*Content*
APPROVAL REQUIRED
Contact Risk and Legal at [RM@SCPHealth.com|mailto:RM@SCPHealth.com]
If this provider calls you, state the following: _“I see that you have been in the system previously. Let me pull your file, review it with the appropriate personnel and call you back soon.”_
*Background color:* Orange
*Placement:* below the header and above the tabs component
*Component Visibility:* Clinical Match Group = 2 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support app

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1247, PR1050558-1523, PR1050558-1524, PR1050558-1884, PR1050558-1940 *Validation Rule:*

Create a validation rule in CPA to check if Physician Healthcare Facility.AccountID = NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility.AccountID other wise throw error that “CPA Account Association mismatch. Make sure the MD/DO and NP/PA association is make with the Clinician(s) working for the Facility (Service Account)”

*Contract was for a Physician (Clinician’s Professional Titles = MD or DO) AccountId.*

*Queueable Apex:*

Write an asynchronous Apex code (we need MAP to do this logic with less effort so Apex is the way to GO)

When the Contract of Type = Clinician is Executed

Get the Professional Title from Contract.AccountId.Professional_Title__pc



h2. *Scenario 2: If Professional_Title__pc = NP or PA*

Then

*Step 1 (CPA Update): First check for CPA records and repoint new HPF ID update the records to the new HPF*

# Query HPF(s) in the Contract via Contract > PNC > HPF with the ContractId that started the Process and create a map like below 
## Map<AccountId, HPFId > ContractingAccountIdHPFId (Account Id is unique within all the Healthcare Practitioner Facility in a Contract)
## Set<AccountId> ContractingAccountId
# Query the Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c records with Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId = ContractingAccountId
# Loop through the Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c records
## if Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.NP_PA_Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c <> ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId)
### Prepare Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c sObject list for update update with
#### Id = Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.ID
#### NP_PA_Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c = ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(Physician_Healthcare_Facility__r.AccountId)
#### Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”
### add to List for UpdateCPA
### Remove the Account ID from ContractingAccountIdHPFId and ContractingAccountId as they are already processed

*Step 2 (New CPA): Then look at the HPF where HPF Client ID is not in CPA and if there is any delta then use them to create a new CPA (When looking in HPF for record with Client ID not in CPA and If there are multiple HPF records for a same facility and clinician then pick the HPF based on latest Contract Executed Date)*

# Query all HPF in Contract > PNC > HPF where and create a map like below 
## Select Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c, Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId FROM ProviderNetworkContract WHERE Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.PractitionerId.Professional_Title__c in (*DM, DO*) AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId IN ContractingAccountId in SORT BY Contract.StartDate ASEC (old to Latest so that we get only Latest HPF)
### Map<AccountId, HPFId > NPPAAccountIdHPFId (Since we are using ASEC sort you will get only latest HPF !! *Sort is IMPORTANT*)
### Set<AccountId> NPPAAccountId
## Loop through Map NPPAAccountIdHPFId
### Create Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c sObject for each record in the SOQL result from Step 2 -> 1.a
#### Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c = NPPAAccountIdHPFId.get(AccountId)
#### NP_PA_Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__c = ContractingAccountIdHPFId.get(AccountId)
#### Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”
### add to List for InsertCPA



*Step 3* Upsert UpdateCPA and InsertCPA in one DML and ContractId.PersonContactId

----

*Call a Chained Queued JOB and Send the Input of Upsert List<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c> and ContractId.PersonContactId from Step 3*

Create Map<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c, Set<Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Id>> MapCPACase

(you can pick any DMDO or NPPA Account ID as they will be the same)

Create List<Case> ListCPACase

(you can pick any DMDO or NPPA Account ID as they will be the same)

*Step 1: Loop through the Update List*

# if MapCPACase contains Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c then
## Get AccountCAPSet = MapCPACase.Get(Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c)
## AccountCAPSet.add(*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c*.Id)
## Put MapCPACase <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*, *AccountCAPSet*>
# else
## new Case
### Record Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
### Subject = Collaborative Practice Agreement - <Healthcare Practitioner Facility>
### Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
### Status = Not Started
### Case Owner = <Account Team “Medical Staff Liaison - CPA> (fetch from AccountTeamMember where TeamMemberRole = Medical Staff Liaison - CPA”
### Priority = Medium
### Contact Name = <Clinician (Person Account)> *ContractId.PersonContactId* from Input
### Account Name = <Service Account from HPF> *Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*
## Add Case to ListCPACase
## Create new Set <Id> <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Id*>
## AccountCAPSet.add(*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c*.Id)
## Put MapCPACase <*Collaborative_Practice_Agreement__c.Physician_Healthcare_Facility__c*, *AccountCAPSet*>



*Step 2: Create Case from List* ListCPACase

*Step 3: Loop* ListCPACase

# Set CAPId = MapCPACase.Get(Case.AccountId)
# Loop Set CAPId
## *CPA Review* = new *CPA Review*
### Collaborative Practice Agreement = [CAPId.Id|http://CAPId.Id] (CPA Id is storied in the Set)
### Case = [ListCPACase.Id|http://ListCPACase.Id] (Case Id)
## Add to a List of *CPA Review*
# Insert *CPA Review*



Testing:

* For Status = Executed, typically this is updated by integration. For testing manually update to “Executed” as an Admin. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given that I am a Medical Staff Liaison - CPA in the Corporate Support apps
When the following criteria are met on a contract record:

* Contract Record Type = Clinician
* *Professional Title*
** *Contract > Clinician Person Account*
*** *Professional Title =* -MD, DO,- *NP, PA*
* *Status = Executed*

Then, if the executed Contract was for a *Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant* (Clinician’s Professional Titles = NP or PA) a Collaborative Practice Agreement record is created:

* For each Healthcare Practitioner Facility associated with the executed contract, *associate the NP/PA to each HPF at that facility* where
** *Professional Titles = MD or DO*
** Status = Prospect, Candidate, Waiting to be Scheduled, Active, WTBS Here-WRKG at Sister Site
** If an existing CPA record exists between the NP/PA and MD/DO,{color:#bf2600} {color}update the CPA record with new HPF with Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending” and and enable history tracking on original NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility and Physician Healthcare Facility using Field History Tracking
* Each Collaborative Practice Agreement record created shall populated with:
** NP/PA Healthcare Practitioner Facility = <Healthcare Practitioner Facility associated with executed contract>
** Physician Healthcare Facility = <create one record for each Professional Titles = MD & DO at every HPF within the Clinician Contract>
** Supervision/Collaboration Status = “Pending”

_Note: If there are NO clinicians with Professional Title NP/PA or MD/DO, then no relationship records are needed_



And, Collaborative Practice Agreement case is auto generated for *each* Service Account with the following information populated: (can split to a new story)

* Record Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
* Subject = Collaborative Practice Agreement - <Healthcare Practitioner Facility>
* Type = Collaborative Practice Agreement
* Status = Not Started
* Case Owner = <Account Team “Medical Staff Liaison - CPA>
* Priority = Medium
* Contact Name = <Clinician (Person Account)>
* Account Name = <Service Account from HPF>
